rationale.fidelity: Diagnoses latent type as unavailable, restores one common score threshold, keeps type as a state, and preserves the expected-value trade-off and payoff terms.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly presents the implementable platform decision, mechanism, stakes, and two-sided screening error; the operational trigger and explicit counterfactual are implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed, so this conditional category is not substantively implicated.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Distinguishes assumed conditional distributions from observed individual type and appropriately conditions validity on supplied distributions and weights.
rationale.overall: A rigorous and economical correction of the hidden-information error with no model drift.
